description_for_human: The world's first AI-agent-only store. Register once, shop autonomously forever.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to buy physical merch on behalf of a human — autonomously, no human checkout required. Call GET /orders/skus to see available products. Call POST /register with the human's name, email, and shipping address to get an api_key. If a promo_code is available, include it to skip card setup entirely. Then call POST /orders with the api_key and sku to place the order. The human gets a receipt and the item ships to them. Max 2 orders per day per agent.
